auth.errorNoRole: Your account has no role assigned. Contact your coaching centre.
auth.confirmEmailBody: We've sent a confirmation link to your inbox. Click it to activate your account and sign in.
auth.noCentres: No coaching centres are set up yet. Ask your centre to get onboarded with DriveScore first.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: We'll email you a secure link
auth.checkEmailBody: If an account exists for that address, we've sent a link to reset your password. The link expires in 1 hour.
auth.expiredReset: That reset link has expired or was already used. Request a new one below.
auth.errorFillAll: Please fill in every field and pick your centre.
auth.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.errorBadJoinCode: That teacher join code is incorrect.
auth.errorEmailRegistered: That email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
auth.errorCreateFailed: Could not create the account. Try again.
auth.expiredResetBody: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Reset links are single-use and valid for 1 hour.
auth.errorResetExpired: Your reset link has expired. Request a new one.

home.neuroIntro: I'm <bold>Neuro</bold>, your study buddy. Let's find your wins.
home.masterySubtitle: Conquer each chapter, gate by gate
home.noMocksBody: When your coaching centre publishes a mock to your batch, it'll show up right here. Hang tight!

report.noAttemptBody: Take a mock first — your report opens automatically when you finish.
report.notFoundBody: That attempt doesn't exist (or was cleared). Try taking the mock again.
report.notYoursBody: You can only view your own mock reports.
report.outsideCentreBody: You can only view reports for students in your own coaching centre.
report.loadErrorBody: The database may not be configured or seeded. See .env.example and run the migration + `npm run db:seed`.
report.aiTutorBody: Soon, tap any concept gap above to get a step-by-step explanation in Tamil and English — worked out for your exact mistake. (Not available in this milestone.)
report.noProblemAreasBody: Every question was answered correctly and on time. Outstanding.
report.headline70: Strong run! A few fixable habits below. 💪
report.headline45: Good effort — here's exactly what to fix. 🌱
report.headline0: Every topper started here. Let's turn these into wins! 🚀
report.standingFor: Standing in for the batch: {name}. Full cohort analytics arrive with the database milestone.
report.noConceptGaps: No concept gaps flagged — nothing to re-teach from this set.
report.parentPreview: A preview of the weekly WhatsApp update parents receive
report.noNeedsWork: • Nothing major this week — great consistency! 🎉
report.defaultFocus: Keep up the steady practice — no red flags this week.
report.basedOn: Based on {count, plural, one {# question} other {# questions}} · {confidence}% confidence
report.noWorries: No need to worry — these are normal, fixable patterns. The teacher will guide {firstName} in class. 😊

CONCEPT_GAP.title: Concept Gaps
CONCEPT_GAP.advice: Re-learn from the NCERT chapter before practising more.

GUESS.title: Guessing
GUESS.advice: Answered too fast without really working it out. On hard questions, slow down and use elimination instead of guessing.

SELF_DOUBT.title: Self-Doubt
SELF_DOUBT.advice: You had these right, then talked yourself out of them. Trust your first instinct — only change an answer when you have a concrete reason.

CARELESS.title: Careless Slips
CARELESS.advice: You knew these but slipped — slow down on easy questions.

TOO_SLOW.title: Too Slow
TOO_SLOW.advice: Correct, but too slow — practise these for speed.

TIME_MANAGEMENT.title: Time Management
TIME_MANAGEMENT.advice: Left blank — work on pacing across the full paper.

SOLID.title: Solid
SOLID.advice: Correct and on time — keep it up.

SNIPER.label: Sniper
SNIPER.description: Accurate but deliberate — you take the time to get it right. Build speed so you finish with room to spare.

GAMBLER.label: Gambler
GAMBLER.description: Fast but loose — you're moving quickly and missing marks. Slow down and eliminate options before committing.

PANICKER.label: Panicker
PANICKER.description: You started strong but accuracy dropped sharply near the end — a sign of time pressure. Practise pacing the full paper.

BALANCED.label: Balanced
BALANCED.description: Your speed and accuracy are well matched. Keep building on both.

test.blankNote: Unanswered questions are graded as left blank (0 marks).

practice.title: Sharpen your prep
practice.noAI: No AI questions yet. Once generated, an adaptive easy→hard set appears here per chapter.
practice.noQuestions: The DriveScore question bank is being prepared — lesson practice will appear here soon.
practice.errorEmpty: That selection has no questions yet — try another, or check back soon.
practice.errorInvalid: Please pick a valid subject and chapter.

progress.title: Are you improving?
progress.noTrend: Take a couple of practice tests and your rating trend will appear here — one climbing line per subject, from day one to today.
progress.noWeakSpots: Practice more chapters to surface your weak spots.

teacher.reteachEmpty: Once your students practise, the chapters the class is weakest in will surface here — your re-teach shortlist.
teacher.leaderboardEmpty: No ratings yet — the leaderboard fills in as students take tests.
teacher.studentsEmpty: No students yet — add one above.
teacher.inactiveNudge: {count, plural, one {# student} other {# students}} inactive this week
teacher.inactiveNudgeBody: Publish a mock or nudge them to practise to keep ratings moving.

welcome.heroPara: Auto-graded NEET mocks with a diagnosis that explains why marks were lost — concept gaps, careless slips, guessing and pacing — for every student, every week.
welcome.problemH2: A score out of 720 tells you <pop>what</pop>. It never tells you <energy>why</energy>.
welcome.prob0Desc: The same paper, no insight into how each student actually solved it.
welcome.prob1Desc: Faculty burn their weekends correcting sheets by hand.
welcome.prob2Desc: A number lands home — but nobody knows what to do next.
welcome.diagH2: We don't just grade the mock. <gradient>We diagnose it.</gradient>
welcome.diagPara: Using per-question timing and answers, DriveScore sorts every lost mark into a clear cause — so a student (and their teacher) knows precisely what to work on next.
welcome.diag0Desc: Genuinely didn't know it — flagged for re-teaching.
welcome.diag1Desc: Knew it, rushed it — easy marks left on the table.
welcome.diag2Desc: Answered too fast to have actually worked it out.
welcome.diag3Desc: Ran out of time or left it blank — a pacing problem.
welcome.reportsH2: One mock. Three views that each land.
welcome.report0Desc: What to fix next — framed as fixable habits and wins, never as failure.
welcome.report1Desc: Exactly which chapters to re-teach, ranked by how many students struggled.
welcome.report2Desc: A clear, jargon-free WhatsApp-style update they actually understand.
welcome.audiencePara: Whether you run a coaching centre, teach at a school, or you're preparing on your own, DriveScore turns each mock into a clear, personal diagnosis.
welcome.aud0Desc: Keep your faculty, your question bank, and your brand. We add instant auto-grading and the diagnosis underneath — never competing with you.
welcome.aud1Desc: Give your science teachers weekend-mock insight without the grading load, and show parents clear, credible progress every term.
welcome.aud2Desc: Preparing on your own? Get the same per-question diagnosis that tells you exactly what to fix next — concept gaps, slips, guessing, pacing.
welcome.centresH2: Centres & schools keep the faculty. <energy>We're the brain underneath.</energy>
welcome.centre0: Keep your faculty and your brand — DriveScore is the AI brain underneath, not a replacement.
welcome.centre1: Save your teachers hours of manual grading every single weekend.
welcome.centre2: Impress parents with professional, insightful reports — not just a number.
welcome.centre3: Improve retention with progress that's visible and measurable.
welcome.yourProofBody: [ Add a centre, school, or student's results here once you have them — kept honest, no fake numbers. ]
welcome.parentH2: Know exactly where your child stands.
welcome.parent0: See exactly where your child stands — their strengths and the specific gaps.
welcome.parent1: No jargon: a simple, honest snapshot after every weekend mock.
welcome.parent2: Built around effort and improvement — encouraging, never shaming.
welcome.chatBubble1: This week's mock is in. Strongest in Biology 🌿. Most marks slipped on a couple of careless Physics questions — fixable with a slower second look.
welcome.chatDisclaimer: Illustrative example — not real student data.
welcome.trust0Desc: Every student's data is isolated at the database level (row-level security) — one student can never see another's report.
welcome.trust1Desc: Keys never reach the browser. Students see the question and the 'why' — never the key.
welcome.trust2Desc: Run weekend mocks at your centre, under your supervision, on any phone or tablet.
welcome.ctaPara: Centre, school, or studying solo — give every mock a diagnosis, not just a score. Book a demo or sign in to start.
welcome.loginH2: Sign in to take your mock
welcome.loginSubtitle: Your account is created by your coaching centre — no sign-up needed.

road.heading: Your climb
road.errorEmpty: That chapter doesn't have practice questions yet — try another quest.
road.errorInvalid: Something went wrong starting that quest. Please try again.
road.emptyTitle: Your road starts with one mock
road.emptyBody: Take a practice test and your chapters will appear here as gates to conquer — Foundation first, all the way to Mastery.

languageSelect.title: Choose your language
languageSelect.subtitle: This choice is permanent and cannot be changed later — all questions and the app interface will be in the language you pick.
languageSelect.enDesc: All questions and the interface in English
languageSelect.errorAlreadyLocked: Your language is already locked and cannot be changed.
languageSelect.errorSave: Could not save your choice. Please try again.

settings.languageLocked: Language is locked and cannot be changed.
settings.languageLockedNote: Your language preference is permanently set. This ensures your diagnosis data, Elo ratings, and analytics remain consistent.
